name: trace_subrow_dense
description: Sub-row (lane) positioning on a DENSE chart: 5 rows / 11 tasks / 2 milestones with three 3-lane rows, a touching-ends pair and a single-day/next-day pair. Proves (a) same-row same-lane bars never overlap horizontally, (b) an exactly-horizontal date-only drag of a task on lane 1 of a 3-lane row changes neither its rowId nor its lane and does not shuffle its row-mates, (c) a drag from a single-lane row into a 3-lane row on the right side of the chart lands in the target row's lane stack. Regression guard for the GanttLayout.cpp Step 2 packing rule, which freed a lane at the occupant's END DATE while the bar actually paints through start + widthDays - 1.
